raw_input.title: Platform Engineer
raw_input.job_html_or_text: DeployWorks is hiring a Platform Engineer for CI/CD, Docker, AWS deployment workflows, Kubernetes operations, Terraform modules, and production reliability.

profile.base_cv_text:
Ignacio Rodriguez
Backend engineer with Python APIs, Docker, AWS deployment exposure, CI/CD, observability, dashboards, Fiction Express, Talan Consulting, Globant, and Balloon Group.

human_review_notes: Reviewed seed case: materials can position adjacent deployment experience but must not claim Kubernetes or Terraform ownership.
